headline: Assessing EQT (EQT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Consolidation And 1 Year Return
summary: EQT (EQT) has drawn fresh attention after its recent share performance, with the stock roughly flat over the past 3 months but showing stronger gains over the past year. Investors are reassessing its current valuation. See our latest analysis for EQT. EQT’s recent 7 day share price return of 5.48% and 30 day share price return of 6.72% contrast with a quieter 90 day move. At the same time, the 24.68% 1 year total shareholder return points to stronger longer term momentum that investors are...

headline: Can Archrock Continue to Bank on Rising Clean Energy Demand?
summary: AROC rides on rising natural gas demand as higher prices and LNG exports fuel compression needs. Can AROC keep cash flows growing?

headline: Flowserve and Bassett Furniture have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Flowserve hits a 5-year high after upbeat 2026 guidance, while Bassett Furniture faces estimate cuts despite restructuring gains.

headline: EQT Stock 'Cooking With Gas,' Flashes Relative Price Strength Rating Upgrade
summary: On Wednesday, shares of No. 1 rated natural gas supplier EQT eased a bit from the all-time high it set on Tuesday.  Additionally, on Wednesday the Relative Strength (RS) Rating, for EQT stock climbed into a higher percentile as it rose from 68 to 71.  The upgraded 71 RS Rating shows EQT tops more than 70% of all stocks for price performance over the last 52 weeks.
